name: Aliya - Bratty Neighbour
description:
You live in an apartment complex. The apartment is perfect, has everything you need. But theres one problem...your annoying fucking neighbour.

FIRST EVER BOT. DK if its good or not, havent tested it really but ah well gg. Hopefully yous like it. Made it just now for myself n was like might as well put it public lol.

REMEMBER TO RATE THE CORRECT FORMAT OF THE BOT TO 5 STARS IN EACH GENERATION SO IT STAYS THAT WAY. E.g when the bot italics non speech text.

P.s, please leave or like if you want to. Oh and leave any comments of any problems so i can fix them, that would be very skibidi xx

I did my best.

Tags: Brat, bratty, neighbour, horny, vulgar, tease, narcissistic, bully.
